description.zh: 纯 skill plugin (modules/02 §359-§384) · 暴露 /make-game-design slash 命令,引导 cc-coder 系列 agent 在 30 分钟内从一句话愿景产出可玩 demo 的最小设计文档 (玩法 / 数值 / 角色 / 章节)。
description.en: Pure-skill plugin. Exposes /make-game-design slash command that walks cc-coder-style agents through producing a minimal playable design doc (gameplay / numbers / characters / chapters) from a one-line vision in ~30 minutes.
